title: ammannia coccinea subsp. robusta
intro: Ammannia coccinea subsp. robusta is a plant species known for its vibrant red flowers and is native to tropical Africa. It is also known as African fire flower and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimalarial, and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for treating fever, wounds, and respiratory issues. Ammannia coccinea subsp. robusta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which may aid in reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system.
